results.rendered_html: taruṇāy (von taruṇa), taruṇāyate jung —, frisch werden: uḍumbararasaṃ pītvā vṛddho 'pi taruṇāyate  SUŚR. 2,156,1 .  HARIV. 4745 . jung —, frisch bleiben: cakṣuḥśrotre ca jīryete tṛṣṇaikā taruṇāyate  PAÑCAT. V, 15 .  BHARTṚ. 3,9 .
